appflow.flow.s3outputformatconfig.Aggreg.Docs: The aggregation settings that you can use to customize the output format of your flow data.

appflow.flow.s3outputformatconfig.FileTy.Docs: Indicates the file type that Amazon AppFlow places in the Amazon S3 bucket.

appflow.flow.s3outputformatconfig.Prefix.Docs: Determines the prefix that Amazon AppFlow applies to the folder name in the Amazon S3 bucket. You can name folders according to the flow frequency and date.
